formula_display: Surface area = Counter length × depth; Backsplash = length × backsplash_height; Cost = area × price/m²
result_context: Surface area: {surface_area_m2} m², linear metres: {linear_meters}, backsplash: {backsplash_area_m2} m²
steps: Subtract cutout allowance: 1 sink cutout ≈ 0.2 m²
mistakes: Forgetting to account for overhangs (typically 3-4 cm on seating sides)
Not measuring the backsplash area separately from the counter
Assuming one slab covers everything — large kitchens often need seams

es.name: Calculadora de Encimera
es.desc: Calculadora 1108. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
es.seo_title: Calculadora de Encimera – Área, Salpicadero y Coste
es.seo_desc: Calcula el área de la encimera, el salpicadero y el coste estimado. Introduce las dimensiones del mostrador para obtener el área en metros cuadrados.
es.seo_description: Calcula el área de tu encimera, el salpicadero y el presupuesto estimado al instante. Introduce largo, fondo, altura del frente de azulejo y los huecos de recorte para planificar tu cocina.

en.name: Countertop Calculator

en.seo_desc: Calculate countertop area, backsplash area and estimated cost. Enter counter dimensions to get surface area in square metres and cost estimate instantly.
en.seo_description: Calculate countertop surface area, backsplash, and cost estimate in seconds. Enter counter dimensions, backsplash height and cutouts to plan your kitchen worktop budget.
